hero_subtitle: SFTY connects and normalizes multi-provider outputs into one operational workflow to strengthen compliance resilience and streamline audit-ready case management.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling

problem_title: Compliance slows as providers stay disconnected
problem_description: Digital asset compliance teams struggle when KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening outputs remain siloed across multiple vendors. This fragmentation creates manual workload, delays reviews and weakens audit readiness across onboarding and case management workflows.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening outputs into one unified compliance workflow that routes reviews, creates cases and preserves audit evidence for VASP operations.
workflow_title: From provider outputs to compliance decisions
workflow_description: SFTY collects and normalizes multiple provider results then applies internal rules to route reviews, open cases, record decisions and preserve audit evidence.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond provider dependency. A resilient control layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects multiple provider outputs into unified workflows, enabling compliance teams to maintain operational resilience, clear decision trails, and audit-ready oversight without replacing existing tools.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with a provider-neutral compliance layer that preserves audit evidence and enables controlled deployment for scalable operational resilience.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance operations?
faq_1_answer: SFTY acts as a provider-neutral compliance layer that connects, structures and routes outputs from multiple providers into connected workflows, cases, decisions and reporting workflows for digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY orchestrate provider outputs?
faq_2_answer: SFTY normalizes and aggregates checks from KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, then applies internal rules to route reviews, create cases and support compliance workflows seamlessly.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case histories and supporting evidence to maintain a clear, auditable trail that supports internal reviews and regulatory inspections without replacing existing data sources.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY is designed to connect with and sit above existing compliance tools, enabling controlled workflows while maintaining integration with multiple providers and regulatory data sources.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace our current compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace compliance providers but complements them by turning their outputs into structured workflows, decisions, policy updates, audit evidence and reporting packages.
final_title: Build resilience with connected provider orchestration
final_description: Review how SFTY connects and normalizes multi-provider outputs into one audit-ready compliance workflow for VASPs.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
